sentences.english: Describe a gift you received that was very meaningful to you.
sentences.korean: 당신이 받은 매우 의미 있는 선물을 묘사하세요.

sentences.english: The most meaningful gift I've ever received was a handwritten letter from my grandfather.
sentences.korean: 내가 받은 가장 의미 있는 선물은 할아버지의 손편지였어요.

sentences.english: He gave it to me on my high school graduation day.
In the letter he shared stories about his own youth and the lessons he had learned from his mistakes.
sentences.korean: 편지에서 자신의 젊은 시절 이야기와 실수에서 배운 교훈을 나눠주셨어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Working in a Team vs. Alone
Long Commute vs. Small Apartment Near Work

sentences.english: What made it special was the effort he put into writing it — his handwriting was shaky because of his age but every word was full of love.
sentences.korean: 특별하게 만든 것은 쓰는 데 들인 노력이었어요 — 연세 때문에 글씨가 떨렸지만 모든 단어에 사랑이 가득했어요.

sentences.english: I still keep it in my desk drawer and read it whenever I need encouragement.
sentences.korean: 아직도 책상 서랍에 보관하고 있고 격려가 필요할 때마다 읽어요.

sentences.english: No expensive item could ever replace the emotional value of that letter.
sentences.korean: 어떤 비싼 물건도 그 편지의 감정적 가치를 대체할 수 없어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Skill You Want to Learn
